summary: Add relative-path fallback requires for all 11 @jackoatmon/ references in model-router-x — prevents MODULE_NOT_FOUND when running outside Bun workspace linking
root_cause: require() calls used @jackoatmon/ scoped names but package.json name fields are flat opencode-*; Bun workspace linking handled this but plain Node failed
fix_approach: Wrapped all @jackoatmon/ requires in try/catch with ../../opencode-*/src/index.js relative fallbacks, matching the existing pattern used for IntegrationLayer and MetaAwarenessTracker

validation.notes: All 11 references now have fallback resolution; backward compatible since @jackoatmon/ path is tried first
